message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "SalesClerk" as clerk
participant "«presentation»\nDefineNewCategoryUI" as ui

activate ui

clerk -> ui : 1 Define new category
ui -> clerk : 2 asks user information
clerk -> ui : 3 Code, Description
ui -> clerk : 4 displayCategoryInfo

deactivate ui

@enduml
